name: ModelObjectVisualization
summary: The class to set and clear temporary visualization (color and transparency) for model objects in view. Permanent representation will be restored when view is redrawn or temporary visualization is cleared. Can be used also to fetch current permanent representation of model object.

methods.name: ClearAllTemporaryStates
methods.summary: Clears temporary visualization from all model objects and restores permanent representation.

methods.name: ClearTemporaryStates
methods.summary: Clears temporary visualization from model objects and restores permanent representation.

methods.name: GetAllTemporaryColored
methods.summary: Gets all temporary colored objects and their color

methods.name: GetRepresentation
methods.summary: Gets current permanent representation (red, blue, green and transparency) of given model object

methods.name: GetTempRepresentation
methods.summary: Gets the temporary representation (red, blue, green and transparency) of given model object

methods.name: SetTemporaryState(List.Identifier., Color)
methods.summary: Sets visualization temporary state (red, blue, green and transparency) for given model object identifiers

methods.name: SetTemporaryState(List.ModelObject., Color)
methods.summary: Sets visualization temporary state (red, blue, green and transparency) for given model objects

methods.name: SetTemporaryStateForAll
methods.summary: Sets temporary visualization state (red, blue, green and transparency) for all model objects

methods.name: SetTransparency(List.Identifier., TemporaryTransparency)
methods.summary: Restores permanent representation settings and sets temporary transparency for given model object identifiers

methods.name: SetTransparency(List.ModelObject., TemporaryTransparency)
methods.summary: Restores permanent representation settings and sets temporary transparency for given model objects

methods.name: SetTransparencyForAll
methods.summary: Restores permanent representation settings and sets temporary transparency for all model objects

methods.name: SetVisibility
methods.summary: Sets visibility for given model objects.

methods.name: UnhideParts
methods.summary: Unide all parts in the model.
